utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final property solution includes all six of these items, each fully specified with detailed subfields (property has type, price, currency, bedrooms, accessibility_features, location_region; financing has solution, terms, processing_fees; legal_services has service_name, costs, currency, coverage_assumption; moving_services has service_level, costs, currency, packing_included; setup_services has utility_package_type, costs, currency, services_included; total_budget has detailed cost breakdown and currency). There is also an extra 'property_survey' item, but that does not affect the count. All required items are fully covered and properly detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final property solution shows a purchase (not rental) of a bungalow priced at CAD 650,000. Among the ground-truth purchase properties, the only one at approximately CAD 650K is the 'Family House' (rated 9). The financing solution is 'cash purchase using home equity', which corresponds to 'Cash Purchase' in purchase_financing (rated 10). The legal service described matches a full legal conveyance for a cash purchase; the closest match in the ground truth is 'Premium Legal Package' (rated 9). The property survey explicitly names 'Full Structural Survey' (rated 10). The moving service is 'standard' with cost CAD 650 — this aligns with 'Standard Moving' (rated 7). The utility setup service is 'premium' costing CAD 280, which corresponds to 'Premium Utilities' (rated 9).
